headline: Is Linde plc (LIN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is LIN a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Linde plc on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on LIN. Linde plc’s share was trading at $501.87 as of May 6th. LIN’s trailing and forward P/E were 32.73 and 27.62 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Linde […]

headline: Trump's Trading Disclosure Shows Activity In Nvidia, AMD, Microsoft, Oracle And Other Major Stocks
summary: Whether the transactions reflected direct trading activity by Trump or activity conducted through managed accounts is not clear.
